summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChiPi Link Integration Hub - new microservice running on port 8002 with shared MongoDB database

minor_warnings.issue: Job processor falls back to polling mode (5s interval) due to MongoDB Change Streams not supported in single-instance setup
minor_warnings.impact: Jobs processed every 5 seconds instead of real-time, but functionality works correctly

minor_warnings.issue: Telegram polling disabled due to missing TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
minor_warnings.impact: Expected behavior - Telegram integration not configured

minor_warnings.issue: Test jobs fail with 'No handler for job type' warnings
minor_warnings.impact: Expected behavior - test jobs used for API testing only

passed_tests: Main app health: GET http://localhost:8001/api/health returns healthy status with db=chipi_link
Integration Hub health: GET http://localhost:8002/health returns ok with service=integration-hub
Hub dashboard: GET http://localhost:8002/api/dashboard/status returns complete system stats, job counts, and integrations array
Hub integrations list: GET http://localhost:8002/api/integrations/ returns all 6 integrations (monday, telegram, gmail, onesignal, laopan, fusebase)
Hub jobs list: GET http://localhost:8002/api/jobs/ returns jobs array and counts object with pending/running/done/failed counters
Hub trigger job: POST http://localhost:8002/api/jobs/trigger successfully creates pending jobs with proper job_id and status
Hub connections test: GET http://localhost:8002/api/debug/connections shows mongodb=connected, integration status checks working
Hub env check: GET http://localhost:8002/api/debug/env confirms MONGO_URL=set and DB_NAME=set
Hub test API: POST http://localhost:8002/api/debug/test-api successfully calls main app health endpoint
Main app admin login: POST https://playwright-login-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth-v2/login works with teck@koh.one / Acdb##0897
Shared database verification: Both services accessing chipi_link database correctly
Integration Hub supervisor process running stable on port 8002
All hub endpoints properly prefixed with /api/ for Kubernetes routing
Job processor working in polling mode with proper error handling and retry logic
